title: Knolpower Modpack
description: A Modpack used by Dutch content creator EnzoKnol.
body:
![KP Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/836b08cf4eb308ee31d7afd7fd755186c021d379.png)
# The Knolpower Modpack
This modpack is used by Dutch content creator "EnzoKnol" in his Hardcore Survival livestream(s). It has some mode that make your game nicer than the normal Vanilla Minecraft.

- **KNOLPOWER HARDCORE PACK NOT INCLUDED!** Please become a member on EnzoKnol's YouTube channel to download the recource pack.


**Subscribe to EnzoKnol's [YouTube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@EnzoKnol)**

---
For any **questions** please contact me on [x/Twitter or Instagram](https://linktr.ee/QuintenVms) or join my [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/6kDVV7y3FV)
